title: AssetTypeEnum
description: Represents an enumeration list to identify the asset type.

oneOf.title: Cash
oneOf.description: Identifies cash in a currency form.

oneOf.title: Commodity
oneOf.description: Identifies basic good used in commerce that is interchangeable with other goods of the same type.

oneOf.title: LetterOfCredit
oneOf.description: Identifies an asset as a letter of credit or documentary credit/ bankers commercial credit.  A payment mechanism used in international trade to provide economic guarantee of payment by a creditworthy issuer for payment of exported goods.

oneOf.title: ListedDerivative
oneOf.description: Identifies an asset as a listed derivative on an exchange.

oneOf.title: Loan
oneOf.description: An asset that represents a loan or borrow obligation.

oneOf.title: Security
oneOf.description: Identifies negotiable financial instrument of monetary value with an issue ownership position.
